'''Jjorg''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was a member of the [[Freedom resistance movement]] on [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]]. Her blonde hair was drawn into a ponytail, with the sides of her skull shaved. She was killed by [[Salkeli]] in [[Blaine Harris]]' office.

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1st}}
